The '''''Gilagimar''''' was a large<ref name="TEGTW" /> [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]-classed<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]<ref name="TEGTW" /> that was one of the most famous [[Warship/Legends|warships]] of the [[Expansionist Period/Legends|Expansion Period]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|340|Gilagimar}}</ref> of around [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]] to [[20,000 BBY/Legends|20,000 BBY]]. It also participated in the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], a series of conflicts between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the world [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]], and their respective allies that lasted from [[17,018 BBY]] to [[3017 BBY]]. During the Alsakan Conflicts, the ''Gilagimar'' was one of the few large capital [[Starship/Legends|ships]] used by Coruscant.<ref name="TEGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Gilagimar'' was first mentioned in the ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', a [[1993]] supplement for [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Michael Allen Horne]].<ref name="DESB">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>
